title: T001 ‚Äî Copy template into Factory solution
body:
Copy `knights-templates` to `Factory`, rename `knights.slnx`‚Üí`Factory.slnx`, update solution-name references.

**Accept:** `dotnet build Factory.slnx` succeeds on the unmodified copy.

See `docs/ways-of-work/plan/factory-management/issues-checklist.md`.

title: T002 ‚Äî Remove sample modules (Catalog, Ordering)
body:
Delete `src/Modules/Catalog` and `src/Modules/Ordering`; remove their `ProjectReference` in `Api.csproj` and `typeof(...).Assembly`/usings in `Program.cs`.

**Accept:** `dotnet build` succeeds; no Catalog/Ordering symbols remain.

title: T003 ‚Äî App config for ÿßŸÑŸÅÿßÿ±ÿ≥
body:
`appsettings.json`: `Database=alfaris`; `Jwt:Issuer/Audience=al-faris`; add `Seed` (AdminEmail/AdminPassword/TenantName=ÿßŸÑŸÅÿßÿ±ÿ≥/TenantSlug=al-faris). Add strongly-typed `SeedOptions`.

**Accept:** app boots reading `SeedOptions`; no hard-coded secrets.

title: T010 ‚Äî Grid DTOs (GridQuery/PagedResult)
body: `Shared/BuildingBlocks/Grids/`: `GridQuery`, `GridSort`, `GridFilter`, `GridFilterOp`, `PagedResult<T>` (TotalPages + PageSize clamp helper).

title: T011 ‚Äî Grid field metadata (GridFieldMap)
body: `GridFieldType` enum; `GridField` record; `GridFieldMap<T>` (Fields + `Selector(key)` expression). Single source of truth per grid (sort+filter+search+chart+export).

title: T012 ‚Äî ApplyGridQuery engine (hand-rolled expressions)
body: `ApplyGridQuery<T> ‚Üí Result<IQueryable<T>>`: validate fields vs map (unknown ‚Üí `Error.Validation(grid.unknown_field)`); fold Sort into OrderBy/ThenBy; AND per-column filters; OR global search over searchable text. **No System.Linq.Dynamic.Core.**

title: T013 ‚Äî ToPagedResultAsync
body: COUNT then Skip/Take with projection; clamp PageSize [1..200].

title: T014 ‚Äî TEST: grid engine
body: Unit tests: each GridFilterOp, multi-column sort precedence, global search OR, unknown-field rejection, page clamping.

title: T015 ‚Äî Chart contracts
body: `Shared/BuildingBlocks/Charts/`: `ChartAggregation`, `ChartPoint`, `ChartSeries`, `ChartFieldDescriptor`, `ChartDataSourceMetadata`, `ChartComputeRequest`.

title: T016 ‚Äî IChartDataSource interface
body: `Key`, `DisplayName`, `Describe()`, `ComputeAsync(...)`. Inversion: implemented by grid modules, consumed by Dashboard via DI. No module dependency.

title: T017 ‚Äî Export packages (ClosedXML, QuestPDF)
body: Add to `Directory.Packages.props`; reference from BuildingBlocks; pin versions.

title: T018 ‚Äî Export contracts + Excel exporter
body: `ExportFormat`, `ExportColumn`, `IGridExporter`; `ExcelGridExporter` (ClosedXML) typed cells + headers.

title: T019 ‚Äî PDF exporter (RTL Arabic)
body:
`PdfGridExporter` (QuestPDF) RTL document, embed Cairo/Amiri font, table + title.

**Accept:** Arabic headers render RTL.

title: T020 ‚Äî Export DI registration + factory
body: Register exporters keyed by `ExportFormat`; `IGridExporterFactory.For(format)`; clamp ~50k rows.

title: T021 ‚Äî TEST: exporters
body:
xlsx round-trip (header/first row); PDF non-empty + contains Arabic glyphs.

üî∂ REVIEW GATE M1: freeze contracts.

title: T030 ‚Äî Clients: project + module shell
body: `src/Modules/Clients/Clients.csproj` (copy Catalog csproj); `ClientsModule : IModule`.

title: T031 ‚Äî Clients: Domain
body: `Client` aggregate (Name, Contact{Name,Phone,Email}, AccountBalance, ActivityLevel, Status, Notes, timestamps); reuse Email/Money VOs; `Create/Update/SetStatus ‚Üí Result<>`; errors; `IClientRepository`.

title: T032 ‚Äî Clients: Persistence
body: `ClientsDbContext` schema `clients`; `ClientConfiguration`; `ClientRepository`; design-time factory.

title: T033 ‚Äî Clients: Contracts + Mapping
body: Request/Response records; `ClientsMappingConfig : IRegister` (entity‚Üíresponse VO unwrap, request‚Üícommand).

title: T034 ‚Äî Clients: CRUD features
body: Create/Update/SetStatus/Delete/GetById commands+queries+handlers (+ validators); all `Result<T>`.

title: T035 ‚Äî Clients: grid query + field map
body: `ClientGrid` (GridFieldMap + projection, Arabic labels, Chartable flags); `GetClientsGridQuery` using ApplyGridQuery/ToPagedResultAsync.

title: T036 ‚Äî Clients: endpoints + export
body: CRUD + `POST /api/clients/grid` + `POST /api/clients/export` (strip paging ‚Üí full filtered set). Permissions `clients.read/write/delete/export`.

title: T037 ‚Äî ClientsChartDataSource
body: Implement `IChartDataSource` key `clients`; Describe() fields; ComputeAsync group-by X + Count/Sum/Avg. Register scoped.

title: T038 ‚Äî Clients: seeder
body: `ClientsSeeder` + hosted service, ~15 idempotent rows across statuses/levels.

title: T039 ‚Äî TEST: Clients vertical
body:
Integration: create‚Üígrid(filter+sort)‚Üíexport(xlsx); chart x=status,Count buckets correct.

üî∂ REVIEW GATE M2a: reference slice.

title: T040 ‚Äî Expenses: module + Domain
body: `Expense`(Category, Amount(Money), Date(DateOnly), Payee, Notes, timestamps); factory; repo; errors.

title: T041 ‚Äî Expenses: Persistence + Contracts + Mapping
body: `ExpensesDbContext` schema `expenses`; config; factory; DTOs; mapping.

title: T042 ‚Äî Expenses: CRUD + grid
body: Create/Update/Delete/GetById; `ExpenseGrid` map; `GetExpensesGridQuery`.

title: T043 ‚Äî Expenses: endpoints + permissions
body: `/api/expenses` CRUD + `/grid` + `/export`; `expenses.read/write/delete/export`.

title: T044 ‚Äî ExpensesChartDataSource (month-bucket)
body: key `expenses`; month-bucket Date for Line chart; Sum on amount.

title: T045 ‚Äî Expenses: seeder
body: ~30 idempotent rows over several months + categories.

title: T046 ‚Äî TEST: Expenses vertical
body: Grid + export + chart month-bucket sum.

title: T050 ‚Äî Todos: module + Domain (DueDate‚â•today)
body: `TodoItem`(Title, DueDate, Status, Priority, Notes, timestamps); factory enforces DueDate ‚â• today; repo; errors.

title: T051 ‚Äî Todos: Persistence + Contracts + Mapping
body: Schema `todos`; config; factory; DTOs; mapping.

title: T052 ‚Äî Todos: features + grid
body: Create/Update/ChangeStatus/Delete/GetById; `TodoGrid` map; `GetTodosGridQuery`.

title: T053 ‚Äî Todos: endpoints + permissions
body: `/api/todos` CRUD + `/grid` + `/export`; `todos.read/write/delete/export`.

title: T054 ‚Äî TodosChartDataSource
body: key `todos`; x=priority/status Count.

title: T055 ‚Äî Todos: seeder
body: ~10 idempotent rows across priorities/statuses, future due dates.

title: T056 ‚Äî TEST: Todos vertical
body: DueDate invariant, grid, chart.

title: T060 ‚Äî Dashboard: module + ChartDefinition
body: `ChartDefinition` aggregate (Title-AR, ChartType, DatasourceKey, XField, YField?, Aggregation, ColorsJson, FiltersJson?, LayoutOrder, IsEnabled, timestamps; Create/Update‚ÜíResult<>); repo; errors.

title: T061 ‚Äî Dashboard: Persistence (jsonb)
body: `DashboardChartsDbContext` schema `dashboard`; `chart_definitions` with colors_json/filters_json jsonb; factory.

title: T062 ‚Äî ChartDataSourceRegistry consumer
body: `ChartDataSourceRegistry(IEnumerable<IChartDataSource>)` All()/Get(key); register scoped.

title: T063 ‚Äî Dashboard: features
body: CreateChart/UpdateChart/DeleteChart/GetCharts; GetDatasources; GetChartData (resolve registry ‚Üí ComputeAsync; missing key ‚Üí NotFound); PreviewChartData.

title: T064 ‚Äî Dashboard: endpoints
body: `GET /datasources`, `GET/POST /charts`, `PUT/DELETE /charts/{id}`, `GET /charts/{id}/data`, `POST /charts/preview`. Permissions `dashboard.charts.read/manage`.

title: T065 ‚Äî Dashboard: palette + default charts seeder
body: `DashboardPalette`; seeder (idempotent by Title): Pie clients-by-status, Bar expenses-by-category(Sum), Bar todos-by-priority, Line expenses-over-time(Sum, month-bucket).

title: T066 ‚Äî TEST: Dashboard
body:
Preview‚Üíseries; save‚ÜíGET /charts; GET /charts/{id}/data; removed datasource‚ÜíNotFound.

üî∂ REVIEW GATE M3: verify inversion holds.

title: T070 ‚Äî Identity: extend permission catalog
body: Add clients.*/expenses.*/todos.*/dashboard.charts.* to `IdentitySeeder`.

title: T071 ‚Äî Identity: role templates
body: Owner=all; Admin=all except identity.tenants.manage; Member=*.read. Idempotent.

title: T072 ‚Äî Identity: single-tenant + admin seed
body: `IdentityTenantSeeder` (from hosted service after perms/roles): idempotent by slug al-faris ‚Äî tenant ÿßŸÑŸÅÿßÿ±ÿ≥ + admin User (SeedOptions) + Owner membership.

title: T073 ‚Äî Identity: users grid endpoint
body: `GET/POST /api/admin/users/grid` over IdentityDbContext.Users with `UserGrid` map; permission `identity.users.read`.

title: T074 ‚Äî TEST: auth + RBAC
body: Admin login‚ÜíJWT; Member‚Üí403 on write/manage; users grid paged.

title: T080 ‚Äî API: register modules
body: `Program.cs` AddModules(Identity, Clients, Expenses, Todos, DashboardCharts); add ProjectReferences.

title: T081 ‚Äî API: RTL font + CORS
body: Register QuestPDF Arabic font once; CORS for http://localhost:4200.

title: T082 ‚Äî API: EF migrations (5 modules)
body: Per module: `migrations add InitialCreate` + `database update`. Schemas identity/clients/expenses/todos/dashboard with own history table.

title: T083 ‚Äî TEST: boot + seed e2e
body:
`dotnet run` seeds tenant/admin/sample/4 charts; /health green; clients/grid returns PagedResult; unknown field‚Üí400.

üî∂ REVIEW GATE M5: backend complete.

title: T090 ‚Äî SPA: scaffold Angular (RTL)
body: `web/` Angular+TS; dir=rtl lang=ar; i18n (Arabic default, EN secondary); theme + RTL styles.

title: T091 ‚Äî SPA: OpenAPI TS client
body: Generate typed API client/services from /openapi; env API base URL.

title: T092 ‚Äî SPA: auth (login/guards/refresh)
body: Login (single tenant auto), JWT storage, bearer+refresh interceptor, permission route guards.

title: T093 ‚Äî SPA: reusable RTL grid component
body: Wrap AG Grid; server-side row model‚ÜíPOST /grid; sort, global+per-column filter, column reorder drag&drop, show/hide; toolbar Export PDF/Excel‚ÜíPOST /export‚Üídownload.

title: T094 ‚Äî SPA: grid pages (Clients/Expenses/Todos/Users)
body: Pages using shared grid component + CRUD dialogs.

title: T095 ‚Äî SPA: dashboard view
body: ng-apexcharts; list saved charts + per-chart data; render bar/pie/line with stored colors; drag reorder (LayoutOrder).

title: T096 ‚Äî SPA: chart builder dialog
body: type‚Üídatasource(GET /datasources)‚ÜíX/Y+aggregation‚Üícolors(default+custom)‚Üípreview(POST /charts/preview)‚Üísave.

title: T097 ‚Äî TEST: frontend e2e
body:
npm start‚Üílogin‚Üígrids sort/search/reorder/export; dashboard renders; admin builds+persists chart; RTL Arabic.

üî∂ REVIEW GATE M6: full demo.

title: T100 ‚Äî CLAUDE.md
body: Stack, module conventions (link docs/adding-a-module.md), how to add grid+chart datasource, build/run/migrate, Angular commands, RTL notes.

title: T101 ‚Äî AGENTS.md (Codex)
body: Operational guidance for Codex-CLI: commands, conventions, 'never reference another module ‚Äî use IChartDataSource registry', per-module Definition of Done.
